recommendations.title: Just Before I Go
recommendations.overview: Ted Morgan has been treading water for most of his life. After his wife leaves him, Ted realizes he has nothing left to live for.  Summoning the courage for one last act, Ted decides to go home and face the people he feels are responsible for creatin

recommendations.title: Sisters
recommendations.overview: Two disconnected sisters are summoned to clean out their childhood bedrooms before their parents sell their family home.

recommendations.title: The Bad Poet
recommendations.overview: 1936. Giovanni Comini, the youngest Federal in Fascist Italy, is summoned to Rome for a delicate mission: to surveil aging national poet Gabriele D'Annunzio, whose increasingly restless behavior Mussolini fears could damage his alliance with Nazi Ger

recommendations.title: House of the Long Shadows
recommendations.overview: An American writer goes to a remote Welsh manor on a $20,000 bet that he can write a classic novel like 'Wuthering Heights' in 24 hours. However, upon his arrival he discovers that the apparently empty manor has several rather odd inhabitants.

recommendations.title: The Unholy
recommendations.overview: Alice is a young hearing-impaired girl who, after a supposed visitation from the Virgin Mary, is inexplicably able to hear, speak and heal the sick. As word spreads and people from near and far flock to witness her miracles, a disgraced journalist ho

recommendations.title: Berlinguer: I Love You
recommendations.overview: A young poet falls in love with a sophisticated woman who hates poetry. But the poet wants to win her with poetry — and a bit of help from his mum.

recommendations.title: Kuroko's Basketball the Movie: Last Game
recommendations.overview: Kuroko reunites with the "Generation of Miracles" when former rivals are humiliated in an exhibition game against a notorious street basketball team.

recommendations.title: The Truth About Love Is...
recommendations.overview: Dora, raises her two children with the help of her eccentric family, free-spirited best friend, and a charming poet-turned- nanny.

recommendations.title: Sylvia
recommendations.overview: Story of the relationship between the poets Ted Hughes and Sylvia Plath.

recommendations.title: The Wrong Trousers
recommendations.overview: Wallace rents out Gromit's former bedroom to a penguin, who takes up an interest in the techno trousers created by Wallace. However, Gromit later learns that the penguin is a wanted criminal.
